description: [{"type": "heading", "attrs": {"level": 2}, "content": [{"text": "Join us for an evening of connection, conversation during Nature Tech Week 2026; tucked away in one of Westminster's best-kept secret gardens. ", "type": "text"}]}, {"type": "paragraph", "content": [{"text": "During one of the biggest weeks in the nature tech calendar, we're bringing together founders, ecosystem builders, investors and innovators for a relaxed evening at ", "type": "text"}, {"text": "The Onion Garden", "type": "text", "marks": [{"type": "link", "attrs": {"href": "https://www.theoniongarden.org/"}}]}, {"text": "; a hidden oasis in the heart of London.", "type": "text"}]}, {"type": "paragraph", "content": [{"text": "Whether you’re an founder, investor or curious about the emerging nature-tech ecosystem, come meet like-minded people shaping the future of nature-based innovation.", "type": "text", "marks": [{"type": "bold"}]}]}, {"type": "paragraph", "content": [{"text": "🌱 Connect with innovators working at the intersection of ", "type": "text"}, {"text": "technology and nature-based solutions", "type": "text", "marks": [{"type": "bold"}]}, {"text": ".", "type": "text"}]}, {"type": "paragraph", "content": [{"text": "🌍 Discuss the latest trends in ", "type": "text"}, {"text": "biodiversity monitoring, ecosystem restoration, and nature finance", "type": "text", "marks": [{"type": "bold"}]}, {"text": ".", "type": "text"}]}, {"type": "paragraph", "content": [{"text": "🍻 Enjoy relaxed networking with a community passionate about tech and regenerating our cities and landscapes.", "type": "text"}]}, {"type": "paragraph", "content": [{"text": "Registration covers entry and a welcome drink courtesy of ", "type": "text", "marks": [{"type": "bold"}]}, {"text": "Natura Cocktails", "type": "text", "marks": [{"type": "link", "attrs": {"href": "https://naturacocktails.com/"}}, {"type": "bold"}]}, {"text": " and some light bites - ", "type": "text", "marks": [{"type": "bold"}]}, {"text": "other drinks are available for purchase at the cash bar.", "type": "text", "marks": [{"type": "italic"}, {"type": "bold"}]}]}, {"type": "paragraph", "content": [{"text": "NatureTech Memos", "type": "text", "marks": [{"type": "link", "attrs": {"href": "https://www.naturetechmemos.com/"}}, {"type": "bold"}]}, {"type": "hard_break"}, {"text": "With over 10,000+ subscribers NatureTech Memos is the leading newsletter covering the intersection of nature, climate and technology. It delivers insights, case studies, and trends on how innovation is being used to restore ecosystems, monitor biodiversity, and scale nature-based solutions. Whether you're a founder, investor, policymaker or researcher, Nature Tech Memos keeps you up to speed on the latest in nature-positive technology.", "type": "text"}]}, {"type": "paragraph", "content": [{"text": "Futures Wild ", "type": "text", "marks": [{"type": "link", "attrs": {"href": "https://www.futureswild.com/"}}, {"type": "bold"}]}, {"type": "hard_break", "marks": [{"type": "bold"}]}, {"text": "At Futures Wild we believe digital products have a huge role to play in nature conservation and regeneration. But legacy architecture and poor user experience can hold back product adoption. Ultimately, slowing down nature-positive action. We are on a mission to change that. Data holds the key to our understanding of how we can regenerate nature on our planet. We design, build and manage bespoke data products for innovators protecting nature, including Birdlife International and IUCN. We combine data strategy, experience design and end-to-end digital product development to help transform data into impact.", "type": "text"}]}, {"type": "paragraph", "content": [{"text": "Regen City", "type": "text", "marks": [{"type": "link", "attrs": {"href": "https://regencity.earth/"}}, {"type": "bold"}]}, {"text": " ", "type": "text", "marks": [{"type": "bold"}]}, {"type": "hard_break"}, {"text": "At Regen City, we help climate and nature innovators build stronger foundations and scale faster by embedding senior marketing, operations and product expertise directly into founding teams.", "type": "text"}]}, {"type": "paragraph", "content": [{"text": "Our ecosystem events are where our work comes to life - bringing together founders, innovators and champions  at the intersection of nature, innovation and cities to spark connections and conversations that accelerate regenerative solutions.", "type": "text"}]}, {"type": "paragraph", "content": [{"text": "The Onion Garden", "type": "text", "marks": [{"type": "link", "attrs": {"href": "https://www.theoniongarden.org/home"}}, {"type": "bold"}]}, {"text": " ", "type": "text", "marks": [{"type": "bold"}]}, {"type": "hard_break"}, {"text": "is a not-for-profit, green community hub in the heart of Westminster for humans and nature to share and enjoy. It is born out of Jens Jakobsen’s passion for plants and nature, and his vision in transforming an unloved and abandoned concrete corner of Westminster into an enchanting space that the whole community can enjoy. It is even more special given its unlikely location and very urban surroundings.", "type": "text"}]}, {"type": "image", "attrs": {"alt": null, "src": "https://images.lumacdn.com/uploads/1g/d591f59a-d0cd-49fc-a671-dbd9229966f6.png", "width": 1382, "height": 222, "image_id": "local-upload-blob:https://luma.com/bb6749b3-dc8b-40c4-b989-04d590c7a8c5", "mime_type": null, "uploaded_at": "2026-04-29T10:09:04.488+01:00", "is_uploading": false, "resize_width": null}}]

description: [{"type": "paragraph", "content": [{"text": "Join us for a focused session on building a Go-To-Market engine that actually works for early-stage startups.", "type": "text"}]}, {"type": "paragraph", "content": [{"text": "​​Many founders don’t struggle because of product, they struggle because they haven’t defined a clear ICP, a sharp value proposition, and a repeatable path to growth.", "type": "text"}]}, {"type": "paragraph", "content": [{"text": "​​Hear directly from operators and GTM leaders on what it really takes to move from first customers to scalable acquisition: the frameworks that work, the mistakes that slow teams down, and how to build momentum without burning through channels too early.", "type": "text"}]}, {"type": "paragraph", "content": [{"text": "​​We’ll also go hands-on with diagnosing common GTM breakdowns; trust, clarity, and access, and how to turn them into a clear 90-day execution plan.", "type": "text"}]}, {"type": "paragraph", "content": [{"text": "​​If you’re building and trying to unlock repeatable growth, this is the room to be in.", "type": "text"}]}]

description: [{"type": "paragraph", "content": [{"text": "A meet-up for builders and doers in London. Pizza, drinks, and 3 X 7-minute demos of whatever you're working on - side projects, research, hardware hacks, startup tech, weird experiments. Work in progress is very much encouraged.", "type": "text"}, {"type": "hard_break"}, {"type": "hard_break"}, {"text": "* spaces are very limited - 20-30 highly-selective people only.", "type": "text"}]}, {"type": "paragraph", "content": [{"text": "Demoers:", "type": "text"}, {"type": "hard_break"}, {"text": "- ", "type": "text"}, {"text": "Alex Araki ", "type": "text", "marks": [{"type": "link", "attrs": {"href": "https://alexaraki.xyz/"}}]}, {"text": "- impact philanthropy fundraising and non-traditional avenues for innovation.", "type": "text"}, {"type": "hard_break"}, {"text": "- ", "type": "text"}, {"text": "Sonia Litwin", "type": "text", "marks": [{"type": "link", "attrs": {"href": "https://sonialitwin.com/"}}]}, {"text": " - using computer and neuroscience to deepen the understanding of emotional immersion in human interaction with embodied intelligent systems.", "type": "text"}, {"type": "hard_break"}, {"text": "- ", "type": "text"}, {"text": "Josh Muthu", "type": "text", "marks": [{"type": "link", "attrs": {"href": "https://uk.linkedin.com/in/joshuamuthu"}}]}, {"text": " - researching the economic consequences of relaxing England's planning regulation.", "type": "text"}]}, {"type": "paragraph", "content": [{"text": "Demos Anon London is the sister community of Demos Anon Dublin (", "type": "text"}, {"text": "demosanon.com", "type": "text", "marks": [{"type": "link", "attrs": {"href": "https://demosanon.com"}}]}, {"text": "), which has been running for 2.5 years and 50+ sessions strong. In Dublin, past demos have ranged from at-home stroke risk monitoring hardware (NeuroSonic), to classifying the coldest exoplanets using James Webb Space Telescope data, to building a brain-computer interface, to a coin-sized swim timer designed to mount inside goggles, to toolpath generation methods for 3D printing. The thread that connects it all: people who build things showing other people who build things what they're obsessed with.", "type": "text"}]}, {"type": "paragraph", "content": [{"text": "This is our 3rd London session in collab with incident.io. Come hang out, meet some cool people, and maybe sign up to demo something at a future session.", "type": "text"}]}, {"type": "paragraph", "content": [{"text": "Free to attend. We help engineering teams respond to and learn from incidents, minimise downtime, and focus on solving the problems that matter.", "type": "text"}]}, {"type": "paragraph", "content": [{"text": "demoslondon.com", "type": "text", "marks": [{"type": "link", "attrs": {"href": "https://demoslondon.com"}}]}]}]
